creator: till@php.net
text:
On Thu, Feb 26, 2009 at 8:10 PM, Wesley Shields <wxs@freebsd.org> wrote:

> (...)

Just on file here, maybe you could supply me with the erl_crash.dump
and I can look into it, or at least ask people who are more fluent
than me. :-) I know it builds on 6.4 and 7.x though.

-- Till
